economic_notes: First Nation operates Pabineau Seafood Market and Takeout, Pabineau Gas Bar and Tobacco Shop, and Pabineau Trucking as consolidated entities. Also holds 51% limited partnership interest in Oinpegitjoig Wind GP Ltd. (wind energy) accounted for by modified equity method.
notes: Large surplus of $9.15M in FY2023 vs $3.6M prior year, driven by significant increase in ISC funding ($7.86M vs $5.62M) and 'Other' revenue ($6.64M vs $2.98M). Deferred revenue dropped significantly from $4.1M to $0.6M, suggesting recognition of previously deferred ISC and other funds. Tangible capital assets increased substantially from $11.1M to $18.5M due to $8.48M in acquisitions. Wind GP investment (Oinpegitjoig Wind GP Ltd.) held at $768,696 using modified equity method. Fishing licenses are intangible assets not recognized on the balance sheet. Deferred revenue - ISC funding went from $1,489,751 to $0.
